checks.name: every kinematic mesh role is physically represented by generated geometry
generated package includes an explicit shaft/arbor part
role manifest is backed by generated support solids, not labels only
checks.reason: V29 role manifest declares supports, but no generated audit proves bores, seats, or support solids for the declared axes.

checks.name: all visible moving roles are represented in the motion graph
gear train closes through physical mesh types actually present in geometry
checks.reason: Current geometry uses a spur horizontal gear, a spur vertical gear, and a canted spur gear where the contract requires two bevel-equivalent axis transitions.

checks.name: viewer transforms are joint-relative rather than whole-part self-rotations
checks.reason: Current viewer rotates meshes about their own imported origins and can animate disconnected bodies without shafts or mates.

failure_summary: V29 geometry is a disconnected visual study, not a mechanically closed sculpture object.
